description: Read, search, draft, send, and organize email through Gmail, Outlook, and IMAP/SMTP mailboxes.
name: io.github.churichard/fluxmail

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for Fluxmail's built-in Desktop OAuth client ID.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Client secret paired with a custom Google OAuth client ID.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Directory for the Fluxmail database, encryption key, and stored settings.
environmentVariables.name: FLUXMAIL_DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional Fluxmail license key for paid plan limits.
environmentVariables.name: FLUXMAIL_LICENSE_KEY

title: Fluxmail
